title: Twitch Reverses Combined Chat Ban After Streamer Backlash
description: Twitch warned a creator for displaying a combined chat while multistreaming. The community called it out as ridiculous, and CEO Dan Clancy has confirmed Twitch will no longer enforce the rule.
author: Stream Report

title: 2025: A Year in Review (Ranking My Predictions)
description: It’s the final edition of the year! We’re grading my 25 predictions from January to see which streaming trends I nailed and which ones I missed completely.
author: Stream Report

title: Twitch’s New Sponsorship Tool: A Rocky Start to a Good Idea
description: Twitch’s long-awaited Sponsorship Dashboard is finally live for Partners, but the initial pay rates caused a stir. We break down the numbers, the sudden pay hikes, and what this means for the future of the program.
author: Stream Report

title: 5 New Creative Tools For YouTube Shorts
description: YouTube is significantly upgrading the Shorts creation experience with five new tools set to launch this spring.
author: Stream Report

title: Twitch Monetization Has a Catch
description: Twitch's latest monetization update has a big implication for non-Affiliate streamers. Discover how the new system works and who really benefits from the change.
author: Stream Report

title: Twitch Will Remove Your Highlights Soon
description: Twitch has announced a significant change to their content storage policy, implementing a 100-hour storage limit for Highlights and Uploads starting April 19, 2025. This update could affect long-time content creators and specific communities that rely heavily on these features. Here's what's happening and how you can prepare.
author: Stream Report

title: YouTube Turns 20: Big Changes Coming in 2025
description: YouTube celebrates its 20th birthday with some major announcements about where the platform is headed. CEO Neal Mohan has outlined four key areas of focus that could reshape how creators work and earn on the platform.
author: Stream Report

title: The Best Platforms for Growing Your Audience
description: We highlight the best platforms for small accounts to achieve growth, examine effective content strategies for streamers, and discuss the importance of video and authentic engagement.
author: Stream Report

title: Twitch CEO Calls Out YouTube and Kick for Copying
description: In a recent interview, Twitch CEO Dan Clancy shared his insights on the competitive landscape of the livestreaming industry, addressing Twitch's biggest rivals: YouTube, TikTok, and Kick. Here’s a breakdown of what he had to say.
author: Stream Report

title: Live Rewind Is Here... But Not on Twitch
description: Kick’s new pause and rewind feature has streamers and viewers asking: Why hasn’t Twitch done this yet?
author: Stream Report

title: TikTok Is Back... For Now
description: TikTok’s future in the US has been thrown into turmoil, with bans, executive orders, and app store removals creating a whirlwind of confusion. Here’s how it’s unfolding and what it means for creators.
author: Stream Report

title: Twitch Clips Get an Upgrade
description: Twitch has been rolling out a series of updates to its clips system, improving how clips are created, managed, and shared. These changes aim to make clips more useful for both streamers and their communities. Let’s break down all the new features and experiments Twitch has introduced.
author: Stream Report

title: OBS Studio 31 Brings Big Wins for Streamers
description: OBS Studio 31 is here, bringing new tools for NVIDIA users and quality-of-life updates for everyone. From GPU-accelerated effects to improved scene scaling, here’s what’s new in this release.
author: Stream Report

title: Twitch’s New Rulebook
description: Twitch is stepping up its game regarding transparency and clarity around its rules. The platform launched a new feature called Enforcement Notes, designed to make its Community Guidelines easier to understand and follow.
author: Stream Report

title: Why Are Streamers Coming Back to Twitch?
description: We explore why streamers are returning to Twitch after their YouTube contracts end, discuss the rise of multistreaming, and analyze the shifting strategies of major livestreaming platforms.
author: Stream Report

title: Why is Twitch Still Losing Money?
description: In 2014, Amazon made a bold move by acquiring Twitch for nearly $1 billion. Fast forward a decade, and the livestreaming platform still hasn't turned a profit.
author: Stream Report
